roles.title: Head of Staking
roles.description: Lead staking infrastructure strategy and operations across Hashdex's crypto index products. Responsible for validator node management, staking yield optimization, and protocol research across major Proof-of-Stake networks. Drive product development for regulated crypto ETFs distributed in Brazil and internationally.

roles.title: Research Lead
roles.description: Led quantitative and qualitative research on Bitcoin, Ethereum, Layer-1 alternatives, DeFi, and NFTs to support product and investment decisions. Delivered high-stakes research inputs for executive leadership and global clients.

roles.title: Research Analyst
roles.description: Conducted extensive market research on Bitcoin, Ethereum, alternative Layer-1s (EVM and non-EVM), scaling solutions, DeFi, and NFTs. Provided in-depth technical knowledge for staking operations (bonding/unbonding periods, entry/exit churns, sweeping cycles). Used Python and SQL to retrieve and process on-chain and market data from Dune Analytics, Glassnode, and CryptoQuant.

roles.title: Junior Research Analyst II
roles.description: Wrote a Primer on Smart Contracts and helped create marketing material for the launch of a crypto ETF in Brazil. Participated in investor calls showcasing the investment thesis for Layer-1s. Built workflows to gather on-chain and crypto market data and provided regular updates to internal shareholders and external clients.

location: Rio de Janeiro, Brazil · Houston, TX, United States

roles.title: Geophysicist II
roles.description: Worked on production and research projects for datasets with different acquisition types, responsible for preprocessing and velocity model building routines (full-waveform inversion, ray-based tomography and interpretation). Daily workflow involved Python, shell scripting, and simulations in HPC environments.

roles.title: Geophysicist I
roles.description: Developed intelligence and a workflow for a new imaging technology being tested at the Rio center.

roles.title: Geophysicist I
roles.description: Introduced to seismic processing and velocity model building. Worked on a production project at the Houston center targeting the Gulf of Mexico.
